name: ai-copilot
description: Monorepo root: Railway / CI 构建与启动入口（web 构建 + server 依赖）

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server
scripts.build:web: npm ci --prefix web && npm run build --prefix web
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:server & until curl -s http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/health >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.5; done; npm run dev:web
scripts.dev:server:restart: ulimit -n 8192 && lsof -t -i:3000 | xargs -r kill -9 && npm run dev --prefix server
